description_long: This is a classic Santa Claus hat, featuring a soft, plush red conical crown that droops to one side and ends in a fluffy white pom-pom. The base of the hat is encircled by a thick, textured white band that mimics the look of faux fur, providing a cozy and festive appearance. The red fabric of the crown appears slightly worn and matte, with subtle shading and creases that suggest a soft, flexible material. The pom-pom is spherical and fluffy, matching the white band in texture and color. The hat is designed to fit snugly on a human head, with the crown slouching to one side in a relaxed, whimsical manner. There are no visible logos, patterns, or additional decorative elements beyond the traditional color scheme and materials.
description: A classic Santa Claus hat with a red, slouchy crown, a thick white faux fur band, and a fluffy white pom-pom. The hat is soft, plush, and festive, with no visible logos or extra decorations.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the red crown slouching to the right and the white pom-pom clearly visible at the tip.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thick white band and the pom-pom resting on the surface, with the crown folded over.
description_view_2: Back-right view displaying the full curve of the red crown and the white band encircling the base.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the red crown and the continuous white band, with the pom-pom partially obscured.
attribute_brim_style: thick, plush, upturned band with no structured brim
attribute_crown_shape: slouchy, conical, and rounded with a drooping tip
